In 2011, [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] competed in the [[Super League XVI|16th season]] of the [[Super League]] and also in the [[2011 Challenge Cup]]. Hull Kingston Rovers made the playoffs only to be knocked out by the Catalans Dragons in the first round.
